text:
The report shall be sent to the court in electronic format and served on the parties simultaneously by [time and date].

Business Valuation

(see alternative versions in order 1.1)

The parties shall jointly instruct an [accountant] / [appropriate expert] to act as a single joint expert and to provide a report, addressing:

the value of [business name];

the value of the [applicant’s] / [respondent’s] [shareholding] / [interest] in [business name];

[the liquidity of [business name], including whether it would be possible to draw a capital sum out of it and if so, the most tax efficient method of doing so;]

[the [applicant’s] / [respondent’s] sustainable income from [business name]];

[how a demerger of [business name] could be affected]; and

the tax liabilities, if any, and the date(s) for payment, which would arise in each of the following scenarios:

the disposal of [business name];

the disposal by [either party] / [the applicant] / [the respondent] of [their] / [his] / [her] interest in [business name];

the transfer by [either party] / [the applicant] / [the respondent] of [their] / [his] / [her] interest in [business name] to [the other] / [the respondent] / [the applicant]; and

[the demerger of [business name]]; and

the possible methods of mitigating the amount of tax due in any of the above scenarios, and the likely effects of such mitigation on the amounts of tax due.

The identity of the expert shall be [expert name] / [chosen in accordance with paragraph [para number] above].

The letter of instruction [and [insert any other documents]] shall be sent to the expert by [time and date].

The report shall be sent to the court in electronic format and served on the parties simultaneously by [time and date].

Updating property valuations for final hearing
